Item.Name: Beetroot and Feta Salad
Item.Description: Fresh organic beetroot, crumbled feta, walnuts, and balsamic glaze.

Item.Name: Sourdough Rye Sandwich
Item.Description: Artisan sourdough rye with smoked turkey, avocado, and house mayo.

Item.Name: Spinach Pie and Salad
Item.Description: Traditional Greek spanakopita served with a side of Mediterranean salad.

Item.Name: Feta Pancakes with Salad
Item.Description: Savory feta pancakes topped with microgreens and cherry tomatoes.

Item.Name: Cappuccino
Item.Description: Rich espresso with velvety steamed milk and a deep layer of micro-foam.

Item.Name: Latte
Item.Description: Smooth espresso mixed with steamed milk and a light layer of foam.

Item.Name: Signature Hot Chocolate
Item.Description: Rich, decadent melted cocoa served with steamed milk and marshmallows.

Item.Name: English Breakfast Tea
Item.Description: A robust and full-bodied classic black tea.

Item.Name: Fresh Orange Juice
Item.Description: Freshly squeezed, 100% pure organic orange juice.
